tasks.title: Collect May 2026 turnover (peredaran bruto)
tasks.context: Need May gross turnover from bank + cash to compute the 0.5% final PPh.
tasks.next_action: Pull May inflows and cash takings; reconcile.

assist.hypothesis: May turnover not yet collected; the 0.5% final PPh and the Coretax billing (melati_pph05) both wait on this figure. Likely from May bank inflows + cash takings.

actions.label: Pull May turnover
actions.prompt: For Melati Spa (Indonesia, UMKM final 0.5%): get May 2026 gross turnover (peredaran bruto) = bank inflows + cash takings for the month, reconcile against the client's own records, and record it for period 2026-05. You already have the task context — the only missing input is the May statement + cash figure; pull those, sanity-check they look complete, then record via mm_update with my approval. Follow jurisdictions/id/checklists/monthly-turnover.md. This unblocks the 0.5% PPh + Coretax billing (melati_pph05).

actions.label: Ask the client
actions.prompt: Draft a short WhatsApp to Melati Spa asking for the May cash takings (to complete gross turnover alongside the bank inflows). Draft for my review — do not send.

tasks.title: May final PPh 0.5% — billing code + pay (Coretax)
tasks.context: After turnover is known: create kode billing on Coretax for UMKM final PPh, pay, record NTPN.
tasks.next_action: Generate billing code under client NPWP once turnover confirmed.

assist.hypothesis: Blocked on the May turnover figure (melati_to05). Once known: PPh = 0.5% x turnover (IDR); then a Coretax billing code under the client's NPWP, pay, record NTPN.

actions.label: Compute + draft billing
actions.prompt: For Melati Spa (Indonesia, UMKM final 0.5%): once May turnover is confirmed (melati_to05), compute final PPh = 0.5% x gross turnover in IDR, then prepare the Coretax billing per jurisdictions/id/checklists/coretax-final-tax-payment.md — kode billing under the client's 16-digit NPWP, correct masa, amount = computed PPh. The regime/threshold are already on the card (UMKM 0.5%, under PKP) — no need to re-verify them; do double-check the turnover figure if it looks off. Stop before paying: surface amount + billing for my approval; nothing submitted without my OK.

tasks.title: Confirm employees? (PPh 21 applicability)
tasks.context: If the salon has employees, PPh 21 withholding applies — confirm.

assist.hypothesis: Open: whether the salon has employees. If yes -> monthly PPh 21 withholding applies on top of the UMKM 0.5%; if no -> only the final 0.5%.

actions.label: Ask the client
actions.prompt: Draft a short WhatsApp to Melati Spa asking whether the salon has any employees on payroll (decides if PPh 21 withholding applies). Draft for my review — do not send. If yes, open a monthly PPh 21 track for this client.
